arguments.reason: the route was consolidated with another shuttle

stages.purpose: After the follow-up introduces the missing cancellation capability, cancel exactly the specified record once.

response_constraints: Before the follow-up, state plainly that none of the available functions can cancel a vehicle assignment; do not call a read-only tool because the stable ID is already supplied.
Do not invent a cancellation function, claim that cancellation occurred, or imitate cancellation with an update.
After the function is introduced, call it exactly once with the original ID and reason, then describe only the simulator result.

follow_up_turns.content: The fleet_cancel function is now available. Continue the original request once, using the supplied record ID and reason; do not repeat any lookup.

prompt: Please cancel the vehicle assignment “Shuttle 30 Assignment” (record fle-140). Record the reason as “the route was consolidated with another shuttle.” Do not substitute a status edit or act on a similarly named record.
